disk_availability.destination_placeholder_note: Local operator sets SDI_MODEL_DIR env var to a real path, e.g. /media/matthew-villnave/VL_usb/models
disk_availability.cleanup_risks: none identified; 32B partial shard (3.69 GB) in HF cache is dead weight, could be freed with approval

qwen2.5-7b-instruct-q4_k_m.deferred: too large for next validation step

qwen2.5-32b-instruct-q4_k_m.local: PARTIAL (1/5 shards in HF cache, metadata extractable only)
qwen2.5-32b-instruct-q4_k_m.deferred: 5-shard incomplete, 20 GB total, not appropriate for next validation

selection_rationale.why_1.5b: cleanest step up from 0.5B; lowest resource risk in 1.5B-32B range; best chance to debug orientation/metadata/scaling before larger models
selection_rationale.why_q4_k_m: 0.5B baseline used Q2_K + Q4_K_M comparison — Q4_K_M gives comparator reference; single file, no sharding
selection_rationale.why_defer_3b: intermediate_size conflict unresolved (8192 vs 11008); 1.5B must succeed first
selection_rationale.why_defer_7b: 2-3x the memory budget; 1.5B is sufficient probe
selection_rationale.why_defer_32b: 5-shard incomplete in local cache; 20 GB total; not appropriate for next validation

stage_0_approval.description: Matt approves exact model, quant, destination, max disk budget, download method

stage_1_download.description: download selected file(s) to approved destination; verify file size and checksum if available; do not commit

stage_2_metadata_probe.description: GGUFReader metadata read; verify n_layers, hidden, intermediate, context; verify ffn tensor shapes for layer 0; resolve orientation from role/dimensions

stage_3_orientation_parity_microprobe.description: tiny layer 0 only, single seed; no aggregate; validate orientation formula

stage_4_anchor_probe.description: selected few layers, few seeds; only if metadata and orientation pass

stage_5_aggregate_validation.description: full 384-pair aggregate (or smaller if memory-constrained); comparison to 0.5B baseline

stop_conditions: disk space drops below 5 GB free during any stage
model is sharded unexpectedly (1.5B/3B/7B should be single-file)
checksum/size mismatch between local file and expected
GGUFReader cannot open the downloaded file
metadata fields missing (n_layers, hidden, intermediate, etc.)
orientation ambiguous — raw shape does not match canonical for any reasonable interpretation
architecture mismatch — model is not Qwen2/Qwen2.5
file too large for available disk
next_phase: Phase 31BS — Approved Larger-Model Download / Metadata Verification, only if explicitly requested
next_phase_rationale: download + metadata only, not validation. Depends on 31BS outcome.
matt_approval_phrase_template: I approve Phase 31BS to download Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M into $SDI_MODEL_DIR/qwen2.5-1.5b-official/, max 7 GB budget, huggingface-cli download, metadata-probe only, no tensor validation.
